# llms-full.txt — MiniElephant Full Product Data

> AI-readable full product catalog for MiniElephant Electric Wheelchair

## COMPANY
- Company: Jiaxing Small Elephant Medical Technology Co., Ltd
- Brand: MiniElephant
- Website: https://www.semwheelchair.com
- Email: johnson@semwheelchair.com
- Phone: +86 13819098967
- WhatsApp: +86 13819098967
- Address: No. 18 Zhenzhong East Road, Jiashan County, Jiaxing City, Zhejiang Province, China
- Experience: 10+ years
- Export: 50+ countries
- Certifications: ISO 13485, CE, FDA
- Services: OEM/ODM, factory-direct, sample evaluation, after-sales support
- Payment: T/T, L/C, Western Union, PayPal (samples)
- MOQ: 5 units per model; samples 1-2 units
- Shipping: Sea 25-40 days, Air 7-10 days, Express 5-7 days
- Warranty: 12 months frame/motor, 6 months battery/controller

## PRODUCT LINE: MiniRedone Series
Common specs across all models:
- Frame Material: Magnesium Alloy
- Motor: Dual 350W Brushless
- Battery: 16Ah Lithium-ion (removable)
- Max Load: 150 KG (330 lbs)
- Max Speed: ≤6 KM/H
- Range: ≈30 KM
- Charging Time: 4–6 hours
- Foldable: Yes


### MiniElephant MiniRedone-I
- **Tagline**: The reliable workhorse — base folding electric wheelchair
- **Net Weight**: 47 KG
- **Max Load**: 150 KG
- **Range**: ≈30 KM
- **Max Speed**: ≤6 KM/H
- **Battery**: 16Ah Lithium-ion
- **Motor**: Dual 350W Brushless
- **Frame**: Magnesium Alloy
- **Folded Dimensions**: L850×W675×H780 mm
- **Seat Dimensions**: L1080×W675×H1020 mm
- **Key Difference**: Base model, black tires
- **Description**: The reliable workhorse — base folding electric wheelchair. Black pneumatic tires. Adjustable armrests and footplates. Smart joystick controller with speed adjustment. Anti-tip wheels for enhanced safety.

### MiniElephant MiniRedone-I-W
- **Tagline**: White edition — clean, modern, and stylish
- **Net Weight**: 46 KG
- **Max Load**: 150 KG
- **Range**: ≈30 KM
- **Max Speed**: ≤6 KM/H
- **Battery**: 16Ah Lithium-ion
- **Motor**: Dual 350W Brushless
- **Frame**: Magnesium Alloy
- **Folded Dimensions**: L830×W675×H780 mm
- **Seat Dimensions**: L1005×W675×H1020 mm
- **Key Difference**: White variant, slightly lighter at 46KG
- **Description**: White edition — clean, modern, and stylish. Same reliable magnesium alloy frame and dual 350W motors. Compact folded dimensions.

### MiniElephant MiniRedone-I-B&R
- **Tagline**: Available in Black & Red or Black & Orange
- **Net Weight**: 46 KG
- **Max Load**: 150 KG
- **Range**: ≈30 KM
- **Max Speed**: ≤6 KM/H
- **Battery**: 16Ah Lithium-ion
- **Motor**: Dual 350W Brushless
- **Frame**: Magnesium Alloy
- **Folded Dimensions**: L830×W675×H780 mm
- **Seat Dimensions**: L1005×W675×H1020 mm
- **Key Difference**: Red/Orange color options
- **Description**: Available in Black & Red or Black & Orange. Padded armrests with adjustable height. Breathable fabric seat.

### MiniElephant MiniRedone-I-R
- **Tagline**: Red edition — bold, vibrant, and full of energy
- **Net Weight**: 46 KG
- **Max Load**: 150 KG
- **Range**: ≈30 KM
- **Max Speed**: ≤6 KM/H
- **Battery**: 16Ah Lithium-ion
- **Motor**: Dual 350W Brushless
- **Frame**: Magnesium Alloy
- **Folded Dimensions**: L830×W675×H780 mm
- **Seat Dimensions**: L1005×W675×H1020 mm
- **Key Difference**: Red edition
- **Description**: Red edition — bold, vibrant, and full of energy. Comfortable padded armrests. LED battery indicator on controller.

### MiniElephant MiniRedone-I-Plus
- **Tagline**: Upgraded base model with enhanced comfort
- **Net Weight**: ~47 KG
- **Max Load**: 150 KG
- **Range**: ≈30 KM
- **Max Speed**: ≤6 KM/H
- **Battery**: 16Ah Lithium-ion
- **Motor**: Dual 350W Brushless
- **Frame**: Magnesium Alloy
- **Folded Dimensions**: L850×W675×H780 mm
- **Seat Dimensions**: L1080×W675×H1020 mm
- **Key Difference**: Upgraded base model with enhanced comfort features
- **Description**: Upgraded base model with enhanced comfort. Memory foam seat cushion. Enhanced joystick controller. Quick-release folding mechanism.

### MiniElephant MiniRedone-II
- **Tagline**: Lightweight champion
- **Net Weight**: 42 KG
- **Max Load**: 150 KG
- **Range**: ≈30 KM
- **Max Speed**: ≤6 KM/H
- **Battery**: 16Ah Lithium-ion
- **Motor**: Dual 350W Brushless
- **Frame**: Magnesium Alloy
- **Folded Dimensions**: L830×W675×H945 mm
- **Seat Dimensions**: L1005×W675×H945 mm
- **Key Difference**: Lighter weight at 42KG
- **Description**: Lightweight champion. Ultra-light 42KG frame — easiest to lift and transport. Ergonomic seat with breathable fabric.

### MiniElephant MiniRedone-II-Plus
- **Tagline**: Lightweight with wider 750mm seat for extra comfort
- **Net Weight**: 45 KG
- **Max Load**: 150 KG
- **Range**: ≈30 KM
- **Max Speed**: ≤6 KM/H
- **Battery**: 16Ah Lithium-ion
- **Motor**: Dual 350W Brushless
- **Frame**: Magnesium Alloy
- **Folded Dimensions**: L830×W675×H930 mm
- **Seat Dimensions**: L1005×W750×H930 mm
- **Key Difference**: Wider seat (W750mm) at 45KG
- **Description**: Lightweight with wider 750mm seat for extra comfort. Reinforced frame for larger users. Padded armrests with width adjustment.

### MiniElephant MiniRedone-III
- **Tagline**: Premium high-back model — ultimate comfort and support
- **Net Weight**: 47 KG
- **Max Load**: 150 KG
- **Range**: ≈30 KM
- **Max Speed**: ≤6 KM/H
- **Battery**: 16Ah Lithium-ion
- **Motor**: Dual 350W Brushless
- **Frame**: Magnesium Alloy
- **Folded Dimensions**: L850×W675×H850 mm
- **Seat Dimensions**: L1080×W675×H1200 mm
- **Key Difference**: Premium/high back (1200mm seat height)
- **Description**: Premium high-back model — ultimate comfort and support. 1200mm back height. Memory foam seat and back cushion. Reclining backrest option. Adjustable headrest.

### MiniElephant MiniRedone-IV
- **Tagline**: Tallest backrest at 1250mm for full spinal support
- **Net Weight**: 43 KG
- **Max Load**: 150 KG
- **Range**: ≈30 KM
- **Max Speed**: ≤6 KM/H
- **Battery**: 16Ah Lithium-ion
- **Motor**: Dual 350W Brushless
- **Frame**: Magnesium Alloy
- **Folded Dimensions**: L830×W675×H1250 mm
- **Seat Dimensions**: L1005×W675×H1250 mm
- **Key Difference**: Tall backrest (1250mm) at 43KG
- **Description**: Tallest backrest at 1250mm for full spinal support. Lightweight 43KG despite tall profile. Breathable mesh back fabric.

### MiniElephant MiniRedone-V
- **Tagline**: Widest model with 900mm seat width
- **Net Weight**: 50 KG
- **Max Load**: 150 KG
- **Range**: ≈30 KM
- **Max Speed**: ≤6 KM/H
- **Battery**: 16Ah Lithium-ion
- **Motor**: Dual 350W Brushless
- **Frame**: Magnesium Alloy
- **Folded Dimensions**: L830×W900×H1200 mm
- **Seat Dimensions**: L1005×W900×H1200 mm
- **Key Difference**: Wide/extra comfort (W900mm seat)
- **Description**: Widest model with 900mm seat width. 1200mm backrest. Wide-base stability. Extra-wide padded armrests with premium upholstery.

## FAQ

Q: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
A: Standard MOQ is 5 units per model. Sample orders accept 1–2 units.

Q: How long does shipping take?
A: Sea: 25–40 days. Air: 7–10 days. Express (DHL/UPS/FedEx): 5–7 days for samples.

Q: Do you offer OEM / ODM services?
A: Yes — custom branding, packaging, colors, seat fabric, and design modifications.

Q: What certifications do your wheelchairs have?
A: ISO 13485, CE (EU), FDA (US).

Q: What is the warranty period?
A: 12 months frame/motor, 6 months battery/controller. Extended warranty available for bulk orders.

Q: Can I get a sample before bulk order?
A: Yes, samples shipped within 3–5 working days after payment.

Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: T/T, L/C, Western Union, PayPal (samples).
